Shadowed Rapier  
 

Lore Item Temporary Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 5 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: NONE

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 25

Drops in Innothule swamp a shadowed man camp
QuoteReply
# Jun 11 2016 at 10:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1718583405279
3 posts
Innothule swamp -473,446 theres a camp of them. The newer maps mark right near the location as kobolds. Theres a wrecked boat that they're camped at on the shoreline...

shadowed rapier
QuoteReply
# Mar 15 2011 at 4:51 PM Rating: Good
snailish
4,580 posts
49 shadowed man kills to see the rapier drop.

I believe it is just rare and random on the loot table, as per the other quest items (about half of which I had seen drop in the previous 48 kills).

Hopefully the random number generator is kind to you if you need the rapier to drop...
▲ Page top
cyclops

# Jan 27 2005 at 11:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269872130
6 posts
I camped in SRo just east of undead temple on hill, and cyclops also poped at 11:pm.Didn't need to kill anything.
▲ Page top
ld
QuoteReply
# May 05 2004 at 2:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591801172628
28 posts
do norent items poof when you go linkdead cause i got some serious issues with ld. if they do ill never be able to get it back in time...
▲ Page top
RE: ld
QuoteReply
# Nov 02 2004 at 10:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594573640660
175 posts
I feel your pain,Bro! I had dial-up for years and had constant disconnects while trying to play EQ. Too much graphic info transferring from server to my comp,especially when other players ran by or cast spells. Now I have Road Runner cable and I'm in Heaven :-) I still get a little lag in PoK when it's crowded(the graphics there are higher than most of the older zones),but mostly I run about with ease. I highly recommend you get something similar ASAP. Ask your cable company. My service is only $29.95/month for first year then it goes up to 39.95/month ...still a bargain considering the sheer LACK of lag :-)

If the Red Sox can beat the Curse of the Bambino,you can upgrade your life :-)
▲ Page top
ancient cyclops
QuoteReply
# Jul 22 2003 at 2:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591789974339
6 posts
the ancient cyclops spawned for me at 2:30am EST in south ro. I was there paying for some faction for temple of solosek ro, no one was in zone, so I just killed him. I was amazed. I didn't think I'd ever get to kill him as everyone camps him like it was the last one or something.

after camping the AC in OOT for about 3 hours he finally spawned. Went to WC and killed the first group of Shadowed Men and they dropped 2 rapiers. now i'll be omw to Hasten

#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 04 2003 at 7:41 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i was doing the horse quest< in bafallen< (i did in % minutes)< one guy shout< if somebody want the rapier< i get the rapier< and < well< why not try the ring< took me #) minutes< to get the ring>So< maybe the big secret is< do this quest at night< when is nobody arond>>>lol>

21 posts
Located at West Commonlands at -800/+3800, and dropped on shadowed man.
▲ Page top
JBoots quest
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2001 at 11:08 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757041205
Scholar
30 posts
This is one of three items you need to get a pair of jboots.
The three items are:
1. A shadowed Rapier from a shadowman warrior
2. The Ancient Ring dropped by the Ancient Cyc in either S Ro or OOT.
3. 3250 gold pieces
If camping the AC is too daunting a task you can always buy a pair of Travellers boots for about 5k
▲ Page top
RE: JBoots quest
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 1:56 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750012638
View User Forum
Sage
137 posts
Not that hard to get. Get yourself to the shadowmen camp in WC. Usually someone is fighting them there so you should be able to get a rapier pretty quick. Best chance to loot one is one the warrior sm, since those wield up to two random weapons.
▲ Page top
quest
